zones.name: Berry Border
zones.description: Mostly sunny. Soil is lighter, drier, and looser relative to the other zones.

zones.name: Hydrangea Border
zones.description: Sun in the morning and evening with shade through most of the day. Steep slope with stone retaining wall. Soil is loose, loamy, and dry.

zones.name: Front Yard
zones.description: Mostly shady through the day with increased late afternoon sun. Soil is compacted clay loam, wet in spring and dry in the summer.

zones.name: Back Yard
zones.description: Mostly sunny. Contains four raised beds with hex wire enclosures used for growing annual edibles. Soil is a raised bed mixture with annual additions of compost and leaves.
